name: EuiSkeletonText
description: Placeholder skeleton lines shown while content is loading.

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

isLoading.description:
When true, shows the loading skeleton component.
When false, shows any `children` and announces to screen readers that your content has loaded.

contentAriaLabel.description:
Label your loading sections to provide more helpful context to screen readers.
For example, pass "API keys" to have screen readers read "Loading API keys" and "Loaded API keys".

announceLoadingStatus.description: Makes a live screen reader announcement when `isLoading` is true

announceLoadedStatus.description: Makes a live screen reader announcement when `isLoading` is false

ariaLiveProps.description:
Optional props to pass to the `aria-live` region that announces the loading status to screen readers.
Accepts any `EuiScreenReaderLive` props.

ariaWrapperProps.description: Optional props to pass to the `aria-busy` wrapper around the skeleton content

lines.description: Number of lines to display (between 1 to 10)
